overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a futuristic convertible driving at high speed through a desert highway. The journey transitions from red rock canyon formations to an elevated coastal causeway with a distant neon-lit metropolis, passing through concrete overpasses and tunnels before the final approach to the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with red rock formations

agents.ego_description: driving the convertible at high speed along the desert highway, maintaining a straight course

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation towering over the left side of the highway
large commercial billboard structure visible in the distance above the road
wooden utility pole with power lines running parallel to the highway
sparse desert vegetation and dry bushes along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds along an empty desert highway with towering red rock cliffs on the left and sparse desert scrub on the right. Clear blue skies stretch overhead as the car passes utility poles and approaches a distant billboard, establishing the arid, open environment.

events.description: turns right at intersection onto coastal highway with futuristic city skyline becoming visible in the distance
palm trees and coastal scenery appear along the roadside as the highway follows the coastline

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection and accelerating along the coastal highway toward the distant city

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with tall skyscrapers and neon lights visible on the horizon across the water
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the coastal highway
ocean or large body of water visible to the left of the highway
low-rise industrial structures with green roofing near the highway

segments.scene_description: After turning at the intersection, the highway opens to a coastal view with palm trees lining the road. The futuristic city skyline emerges in the distance across the water, marking the transition from desert isolation to urban approach. Industrial buildings appear on the right as the vehicle accelerates toward the metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through concrete industrial structures

events.description: enters elevated highway section passing through massive concrete overpass structures
passes under large concrete overpass temporarily blocking the sky view

agents.ego_description: speeding through elevated highway corridors between massive concrete support structures

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars spanning across the road
large industrial piping running parallel to the elevated highway
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The highway elevates and passes through a series of massive concrete overpasses and industrial infrastructure. Graffiti-covered walls line the route as the vehicle speeds through the corridor, with the city skyline growing noticeably larger and more detailed ahead.

events.description: takes exit ramp curving left toward tunnel entrance
enters dark tunnel with artificial overhead lighting replacing natural sunlight
exits tunnel back into bright daylight with city skyline visible ahead

agents.ego_description: taking the exit ramp and passing through the short tunnel under the rock formation

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance carved into the rock hillside ahead
enclosed concrete tunnel with fluorescent lighting and graffiti-covered walls
large damaged building or structure with smoke rising from it on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp leading into a tunnel carved through the rock hillside. Inside the tunnel, artificial lights illuminate the graffiti-covered walls before the car emerges back into bright daylight, with the crashed structure visible on the right and the city skyline now significantly closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with city overlook

events.description: red rock formations return on the left as the road winds through the canyon approach

agents.ego_description: navigating winding curves on the final approach to the city, with the metropolis growing larger ahead

entered.detail: steep red rock canyon walls flanking the left side of the winding road
dense urban district with towering skyscrapers and industrial structures dominating the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the highway winds through red rock canyons with steep cliffs on the left. The sprawling metropolitan district dominates the view ahead, with towering skyscrapers and dense urban structures growing increasingly prominent as the vehicle follows the curving road toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transforms from a desolate red rock canyon into a dense industrial approach to a futuristic metropolis. It begins with the vehicle speeding along an empty desert highway flanked by towering red cliffs and sparse scrub under a clear blue sky. As the car turns at an intersection, the arid landscape shifts into a coastal vista where palm trees line the road and a distant city skyline emerges across the water. The scene then transitions from open nature to urban infrastructure as the highway elevates, passing industrial buildings and graffiti-covered concrete overpasses. Finally, the camera pushes forward through this industrial corridor, with the neon-lit city growing larger and more detailed in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a rocky subterranean passage into a vast desert landscape dominated by a distant metropolis. It begins by taking an exit ramp into a tunnel carved through a hillside, where artificial lights flicker across graffiti-covered walls. As the car emerges back into bright daylight, the scene opens up to reveal a crashed structure on the right and a city skyline that has grown significantly closer. The highway then winds through red rock canyons with steep cliffs on the left, while the sprawling metropolitan district expands to dominate the view. Finally, the towering skyscrapers and dense urban structures become increasingly prominent as the vehicle follows the curving road toward the city center.
